announcements.title: School Start Dates 2026
announcements.details: Elementary and Middle School starts August 6, 2026 at 8:00 AM. High School starts August 6, 2026 at 8:30 AM.

announcements.title: 4th of July Parade 2026
announcements.details: The Mountain House 4th of July Parade starts at 9:00 AM on July 4th, 2026. Starts at Wicklund Elementary and goes through the main streets.
